entry.title: Re: How to query Users ad their own Authorization Groups
entry.content: Could you provide more specific details?

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Usage and Context Help Visits reports a...
entry.content:
Hi,

If no tracking data is available for content accessed from SAP Companion, at all, it's pretty likely that tracking has not been turned on in the SAP Companion configuration.  To turn on tracking of content accessed from SAP Companion, you must have the following parameter details added to the SAP Companion configuration:

trackingUrlSEN=https://customername.enable-now.cloud.sap/wa/WorkareaID/

Where:

customername - is the name of your Enable Now system
WorkareaID - is the ID of the Workarea that SAP Companion used to access content

Regards
Shane

entry.title: Re: Monitor Purchase Order Items app show incorrectly data for delivery date
entry.content: Hi Sherget, did you find any solution?

entry.title: Re: QM PP QA32
entry.content:
Hello! This problem can have a few origins or even not be a problem.
Considering the little information mentioned in the post, you can verify that:

- It is a quantitative characteristic and the option "Enter results" is not enabled in the characteristic control code;

Also check if it is a control characteristic that has a dynamic control rule, so it has been skipped.

entry.title: Re: How to tackle Quality Issues after UD?
entry.content:
This is a good way to deal with the problem. The material situation is analyzed from the manual inspection lot (origin 89) and dealt with in greater depth with the quality notification.

Another possibility is to activate control type 08 for the material and move the goods to a warehouse (it can be the same one). This will keep the material in quality control.
From there, simply proceed with the analysis and decision on use, record defects and, if necessary, process the material with quality notification.

If you are going to analyze the material with a task list, remember to enable the options (in the control type control parameterization) indicated in the attached image:

Thank you and I hope I helped.

entry.title: Re: SAP Demo Systems - IDES (ECC) VS BBP (S/4HANA)
entry.content: Currently, I have been using the SAP IDES from sapidessandbox.com for about a year. So far, it’s running smoothly. I can only recommend it—it’s very stable.

entry.title: Issue with Derivation in a new lines BEx-Query (When Do not display)
entry.content:
Hi Experts,

I have an issue with derivation in a new lines BEx-query.

 

Field ZBCURK (Book Currency) is derived from 0COMP_CODE (0COMP_CODE -> ZBCURK)

As you know, ZBCURK is currency field. So, cannot removed from aggregation.

And Because of the user's requirements, the field must be hidden.

 

When the target I/O (ZBCURK) is "Display" (but not filled),

There is no Issue. Data is saved with All attributes being fulfilled.

 

However, When the target I/O (ZBCURK) is "Do not Display" (not filled, Of course)

The Error occurred : 

Missing attribute value in new column / row (ZBCURK)

Unable to check new value for backend, check input.

(The derivation is not working)

 

Relevant Settings are below.

RSADMIN - BICS_NEW_LINE_CHECK_ENABLED : X (Checked)

Analysis Office Technical Setting - New Line Check Mode : NONE (Same as MEMBERS, LINES)

 

Anything I missed?

entry.title: Re: Mass UD without result recording
entry.content:
Hello Subramani!

Using the t-code QM16, it is possible to make the mass usage decision, but there is a validation for this:
- The inspection lot cannot have mandatory characteristics that are open;
- The inspection lot cannot have any characteristics that have been rejected.

 

I must admit that I found it a bit strange that several inspection lots were generated for the same batch of material. I imagine that they come from several movements of goods generated over time.
If the ideal situation for this situation is to have only one inspection lot for the same batch, regardless of the number of movements or entries of goods, I recommend that you analyze the option to create the lot for the type of inspection used:

Thank you and I hope I have helped you.

entry.title: Re: SAP Demo Systems - IDES (ECC) VS BBP (S/4HANA)
entry.content:
Hi Community,

Thanks for sharing, it help us a lot.

 

Regards,

🙂

ZFiori.

entry.title: Re: Download File on Action in CAP / Java Application
entry.content:
Hi @dvalasek ,

I haven't tried, but I would give it a shot in the following way if you already have your method implemented:

  • check if model follows Serving Media Data
  • add on On event handler for the READ method on your entity in the same way as described in Custom Streaming (Node beta), check if the media type element in question is requested, if yes, return the stream with the method you just created, otherwse continue processing
  • build and test with the following URL pattern: /YourEntity(<ID>)/MediaTypeElement as described in Reading Media Resources

In the documentation the custom streaming topic is only for Node and it is in beta currently. I tested the Node.js version with a basic scenario and it worked for me with @sap/cds: 8.4.0

Regards,
Peter

entry.title: Re: Unable to Delete BIN
entry.content:
We found an issue with transaction /SCWM/LS02

The transaction is not giving the correct error message when the bin is assigned to a Work Center. 

The transaction should send the message  /SCWM/lc1 message 177:

     Storage bin xxxx assigned to work center yyyy - Deletion not allowed.

However, it is simply sending back the generic message: Error deleting storage bin.

entry.title: Elimination postings in group reporting
entry.content:
Hi All,

In Group reporting data analysis with posting rules, COI elimination entries are not showing under the first common parent virtual elimination entity while posting level 20 (AR/AP elims etc.) are showing correctly.

The business requirement is to show all the elimination entries (Posting levels 20 & 30 )  in a separate column for analysis. Currently, only posting level data is showing under the consolidation group virtual elim entity column while PL 30 data is shown under the parent/sub cons units.

any ideas are appreciated.

 

Thanks,

SV

entry.title: Re: Multiple items of one material in a delivery an QM In...
entry.content:
Hello! I may have misunderstood, but in this case if you keep the option "For each material document item" and disable the option "Post to Insp. Stock" you will have multiple inspection lots and the material will not be posted to Q stock.

Thank you and I hope I understood and helped you.

entry.title: Re: Efficient Management of CBC Type Transport Requests in S/4HANA Cloud Public Cloud
entry.content:
Thanks for this

Is there any documentation on what gets locked when performing a CBC activity? We created a new company code in CBC and it went into Production soon after and also locked a lot of transactions in the system. I thought it will be only reflected in  Dev system.
You mention that it gets automatically released. Is there a way of stopping that or controlling the release.

Also does the same apply if activating a new Scope ID?

entry.title: Round off Values in SAP Cloud Integration
entry.content:
Hello Experts,

 

I am wondering if I want to specify to which decimal place I would like to round for a certain value in SAP Cloud Integration, is there any standard function I can use?

Right now I am aware that I can use "Message Mapping" - "Round Function".

However, with this function, I can not round the results to one decimal place by rounding the second decimal place. 

If I want to, for example, round "18.2252" to "18.23", is there any standard function in message mapping I can use? (Maybe FormatNumber?But I do not know how to use it)

Or the only way would be UDF?

 

Thanks

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content:
Hi @Jack-pyo 

Thank you for providing the screenshot. However, I am currently using S/4HANA Cloud, and it seems different from your system.😵

Additionally, I’d like to confirm: does FOC order stand for Free of Charge? How can I create an FOC purchase order?

entry.title: Date conversion directly in CDS View entity
entry.content:
Hello everyone,

I want to change the value of a Date field directly in my CDS View; I want to convert this value to the last day of the previous month. It seems very simple as a need but in CDS View I have trouble 🙂

I tried to use the functions dats_add_months, dats_add_days, combined with cast and substring but I always run into compilation problems, in short I can't do it, in pure ABAP it would take a few seconds 🙂

I was suggested to possibly go through an AMDP function, what do you think?

For example if I have the value 20241015, the converted value will be 20240930, if I have the value 20240123 the converted value will be 20231231.

Thank you very much for your help.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content: Oh, I see... you could try to find PO item cagtegory configuration whether can or can not change it. Regarding FOC, yes it is free of charge order and you can set it up in the "Create Purchase Order" Fiori app. See my previous screenshot number 3 since create purchase order frontend public clould is similar to OP.

entry.title: Intelligent Services - HR Triggers (IAM Integration)
entry.content:
We are in the process of enabling HR triggers for Hire, Rehire, Termination, Job updates from SuccessFactors to SAP IAG system where the accesses are managed and provisioned centrally. As part of this connectivity  where employees are created from SF to IAG, we need to perform some checks within employee data before we get these events triggered. 

The reasoning behind this is, the username and email ID are updated from AD (Active Directory) Integration into SF after employees is hired, so the HR Triggers should initiate after ensuring the updates from AD into employee profile (username & email). Is there a provision to include this check as part of intelligent services to ensure the HR trigger is initiated only after the email ID & the username are updated in employee profile. Appreciate your input.

entry.title: ps
entry.content:
想請問Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)

 

情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

 

步驟:

  1. 採購單(有維護專案號碼)入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)
  2. 開立銷售訂單SO&出貨單DN，銷售訂單上有維護專案號碼(WBS)，開立出貨單，出貨單也有專案號碼(WBS)，但是發貨過帳時，系統只允許出未限制庫存(601)
  3. IMG的ITEM CATEGORY在PUBLIC CLOUD無法調整，所以也無法調整Special stock-Q

4.查看Scope:6GD - Engineer Products and Systems - Project with Production

但此scope 銷售訂單出貨是出貨未限制庫存(601)，非銷售專案庫存。

 

出貨單，如下，有維護專案號碼(WBS)，但是代碼為601，而不是601+Q

目前此料有庫存於專案庫存(Q)

ITEM CATEGORY

entry.title: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
Hi PERSON_NAME,
We have been observing high memory usage on SAP PERSON_NAME production system since yesterday.
Pool/PersistenceManager/PersistentSpace/DefaultLPA/LOBPage is around 66 GB now and it is increasing every hour.
 
Our current PERSON_NAME version is '2.00.059.PHONE_NUMBER'
Attaching output of "HANA_Memory_TopConsumers_TimeSlices_2.00.043+", "HANA_LOBs_DiskLOBs_2.00.040+.txt".
 

Please let us know how to stop the growing memory and bring down high memory usage on PERSON_NAME.
 Let us know what is causing the growth of LOB pages?

Thanks,
Chaitanya

Question and Answer:
Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: Installation

Q: Please categorize your issue by choosing the option below that best fits your scenario.
A: PERSON_NAME Software

Q: SAP PERSON_NAME Revision number and Operating System where software is being installed
A:

Q: Software being upgraded (source and target)?
A...(truncated)
------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------------
Learn more about the SAP Support user and program here.

entry.title: Re: SAP HIgh memory usage
entry.content:
3312385 - High memory usage on Disk LOB Caching
2220627 - FAQ: SAP HANA LOBs

entry.title: Publice cloud是否可以直接銷售出貨專案庫存(601+Q)
entry.content:
情境為採購入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)，直接銷售此專案庫存(Q)

 

步驟:

  1. 採購單(有維護專案號碼)入庫時，存貨入到專案庫存(Q)
  2. 開立銷售訂單SO&出貨單DN，銷售訂單上有維護專案號碼(WBS)，開立出貨單，出貨單也有專案號碼(WBS)，但是發貨過帳時，系統只允許出未限制庫存(601)
  3. IMG的ITEM CATEGORY在PUBLIC CLOUD無法調整，所以也無法調整Special stock-Q

4.查看Scope:6GD - Engineer Products and Systems - Project with Production

但此scope 銷售訂單出貨是出貨未限制庫存(601)，非銷售專案庫存。

 

出貨單，如下，有維護專案號碼(WBS)，但是代碼為601，而不是601+Q

目前此料有庫存於專案庫存(Q)

ITEM CATEGORY

entry.title: Re: Single Delivery from Multiple Sales Order
entry.content:
Hi,

To create a single delivery from multiple sales orders, follow these steps:

1. Open the APP "Create Outbound Deliveries - From Sales Orders" (F0869A).
2. You'll see a list of sales documents, including sales orders waiting for delivery.
3. Select the multiple sales orders you wish to combine into one delivery.
4. Click "Create Delivery."

The system will automatically create a collective delivery for the selected sales orders if they meet the necessary prerequisites:

  • Order items or schedule lines that have identical shipping criteria are combined in one delivery. If the data varies between items, for example, if a different ship-to party is defined for each item, two deliveries must be created for the order. Order items from different orders can be grouped together in one delivery provided that they have the same shipping criteria and sold-to party.

For more details, please refer to Creating Outbound Deliveries.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: How to update Master Recipes thru abap Program(Not thru C202)
entry.content:
Hi there, 

May I know have you managed to update the master recipes, for standard value 1 to standard value 6 in PLPO table?

Thank you.

entry.title: Re: Missing "AdditionalMaterialGroup1" Property in Sales...
entry.content:
Hi,

You may try the following workaround: join the data output with the Sales Organization Data node from the API Product Master (A2X) to derive the material groups 1 to 5.

In the meantime, we encourage you to provide feedback on this functionality request for the Sales Order A2X v4.0 API at S/4HANA Cloud, public edition APIs | SAP Customer Influence Portal .

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: sales price not determining in classic variant config...
entry.content:
Hi,

If your customer has subscribed to the S/4HANA Cloud, public edition,(with Grow with SAP packages) and has NOT subscribed to the additional licenses for any advanced variant configuration (AVC) related scope items, they will not be able to utilize the corresponding functionality in the Public Cloud solution.

In S/4HANA Cloud, public edition, only AVC is supported, and the classic variant configuration functions (LO-VC) are not supported.

Best Regards,
Fancy

entry.title: Re: Purchase Order Process Control
entry.content: Hi Jack

Chris

entry.title: Multiple bank in bank selection (FPY1 Payment run) depending the contract account
entry.content:
Hello Guru,

I need help with customization on our payment run (FPY1). Currently, we have four different banks in our country. In FPY1, on the bank selection tab, we have only one bank configured, which means we generate a single file for this bank. This bank then manages the incoming/outgoing payments (and returns) with the others.

I have a business requirement to manage two banks based on the contract account's bank :

  • Banks A, B, and C on CA should go to Bank A (1 file)
  • Bank D on CA should go to Bank D (1 file)

So, we need two separate files, whereas we currently have only one.

I have seen something in FQP4 in Bank selection control but not sur how it works.

Thanks in advance for your help

Farid K

entry.title: MB26 - Copy Goods Recipient to Material Slip in Material Document
entry.content:
Hi,

We are doing Post Goods Issue for Reservation in MB26. Our requirement is that during the MB26 Goods Issue, the Goods Recipient in the Reservation header [RBKP-WEMPF] should automatically get copied to Material Slip field in the Material Document header [MKPF-XBLNR].

How to achieve this requirement? Is there any standard exit available for this?

Any pointers would be helpful.

Cheers,

San

entry.title: I want to get the registered billing data of Invoice Summary(JP Country-Specific Functions) by API.
entry.content:
Dear Experts,

In SAP S/4HANA Cloud Public Edition, using the Japanese Country/Region-Specific Functions "Invoice Summary processing/Report" (F1774)
I want to get the registered billing data by API. (For linkage with external form output system)
I tried using the following API, but I couldn't get the data of Invoice Summary(Payer Invoices and so on), and I'm having trouble knowing which API to use.

・Billing Document(ODATA V4)
・Accounting Document-Read (ODATA V2)

Could you tell me which API can get the data created by using the Invoice Summary function?

If there is no such API, please let me know if there is another way to extract data.

entry.title: Re: Multiple bank in bank selection (FPY1 Payment run) depending the contract account
entry.content:
Hello,

Files are generated from the program mentioned in Payment method in FBZP configuration.

So you can differentiate with different payment method. I do not think it is possible on the house bank level.

entry.title: Re: Customer exit SUSR0001 to log off invalid user
entry.content: Regarding TH_POPUP behavior, I was thinking why the previous developer has added wait step in code after the FM call? Atleast in my system, since the popup does not stay on the screen longer without the wait, I guess the developer added it. 1 advantage with this FM call is that, unlike POPUP_TO_INFORM, this does not have the option in the left corner of the screen where the user can open a new session and simply continue his work. But the downside is, the user still can click on the top left corner of the SAP GUI screen(extreme top left where we type the tcode) and this is how few users managed to sneak into the system.

entry.title: SAP Fiori Tools 2411 Update: Enhanced Full-Stack Development, AI Integration, and More Open Source
entry.content:
The latest release of SAP Fiori tools continues our commitment to simplifying and enhancing the development experience for SAP Fiori applications. In this update, we introduce several new features that bring together frontend and backend development, expand AI-driven capabilities, and further our journey towards open-source integration. Here’s a look at what’s new and what you can expect. 

Integrated Development Experience 

  • Backend UI Service Creation: A significant addition in this release is the ability to create backend UI services directly in SAP Fiori tools. We’ve been working towards making full-stack development more seamless, and this feature reduces the need for switching between multiple IDEs. Developers who work on both backend and frontend can now generate UI services from a Business Object (BO) Interface or ABAP Core Data Service (CDS) views, all within SAP Fiori tools. In SAP Business Application Studio, the UI service generator is integrated into the Service Center, and generated services will appear in your Story Board for streamlined workflow. 

Generate UI Service in the backend from BO Interface or ABAP CDS

  • Enhanced Integration with ABAP Development (ADT): Building on our previous updates, where you could trigger SAP Fiori project creation from ADT, we’ve now added the ability to open existing SAP Fiori projects within ADT. This makes switching between SAP Fiori tools and ABAP Development tools even smoother, allowing you to pick up your work without interruption. 

Unifying SAP Fiori App Development Experience 

Our goal is to align the experience of developing new SAP Fiori apps with adapting existing ones, ensuring a consistent and efficient process for developers.  

To do that, we are enabling the relevant tools to be shipped with SAP Fiori tools to ensure that they all work well together and provide you with a consistent user experience that you would expect.  

For examples, we had added the following capabilities in the previous release: 

  • Creating SAPUI5 adaptation project:  You can now also create SAPUI5 adaptation project in VSC. Application Info page is available for adaptation projects, helping developers quickly access important project information, and offers the same user experience as for design time projects. 
  • AI Features for Freestyle SAPUI5: SAP Fiori tools now include AI-powered features for freestyle SAPUI5 applications, enhancing the capabilities available to developers. 

We are also currently working on the following to continue to harmonize the SAP Fiori app development experience  

  • Reusing Generators and Modules: We’re using the same generator and modules for both creating new apps and adapting existing ones, which brings efficiency and consistency to your development workflow. 
  • Page Map Support for Freestyle SAPUI5: The Page Map now supports freestyle SAPUI5 applications, allowing you to navigate and manage pages with ease, regardless of application type. 

Page Map now shows views for freestyle SAPUI5 app

Gen AI Integration 

We’re excited to announce new advancements in our Generative AI capabilities: 

  • Enhanced Command - /fiori-gen-spec-app: This command is available within the Joule context, providing more precise generation for SAP Fiori applications. Joule slash command gives context to prompts
  • Image Support in Beta: We’re beta testing image support, which will soon allow developers to upload an image or document with embedded images and text to create new projects using Gen AI. Collaborating with our customers on this feature has been incredibly rewarding, and we look forward to further enhancing these capabilities with their ongoing feedback. 

Open Source Journey 

Our open-source journey continues with even more components of SAP Fiori tools now available to the community: 

  • Annotation API Released: The Annotation API is now open-sourced and is being actively used by SAP Fiori tools. 
  • Annotation Generator Module: We’ve also open-sourced the Annotation Generator Module, allowing developers to contribute and enhance this essential component. 
  • Expanding Fiori Generator Modules: We are continuously open-sourcing more of the dependent modules used in the Fiori Generator, providing transparency and allowing for community collaboration on core components. 

What’s Next? 

Looking forward, we’re focused on harnessing AI to interpret service elements and provide contextual mock data, creating a richer development environment. Expect to see features that allow for incremental project updates through natural language, enhancing the developer experience and enabling faster iteration. 

We’re also working on additional improvements to unify the SAP Fiori app development experience, further standardizing the workflows between creating and adapting projects. Stay tuned for more in upcoming releases!

entry.title: Is there a comprehensive UI5 Annotation Reference and Guide somewhere?
entry.content:
Something I am struggling to understand is the concept of local annotations to OData service metadata in UI5 apps (specifically for OData v4, I think...).

I have managed to do little things like make an input multi-line, or hide and element, by using examples gleaned from here or there, but I cannot find any comprehensive reference on annotations, and especially a good guide that explains the basic concepts, and how annotations are structured (For example, when and how do you use Collection and Record and Propertypath elements, etc).

There are little bits of documentations and blogs that show how to do one thing all over the place, so it's really a lot of trial and error (and mostly error!) and little to no success.

If anyone knows of a comprehensive body of documentation that covers this topic, please share!

entry.title: smart facet chart is not showing in object page of fiori elements
entry.content:
hello everyone,

i tried to display chart in a section.in object page. i used facet with reference . but chart is not showing.

anyone have an idea here is my code given by guided development in VS Code.

<Record Type="UI.ReferenceFacet">
      <PropertyValue Property="Target" AnnotationPath="@UI.Chart"/>
      <PropertyValue Property="Label" String="Product Details "/>
      <PropertyValue Property="ID" String="ProDetails"/>
</Record>
 
<Annotation Term="UI.Chart"  >
                    <Record Type="UI.ChartDefinitionType">
                        <PropertyValue Property="Title" String="Product Details of Object"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="ChartType" EnumMember="UI.ChartType/Bar"/>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Dimensions">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>UnitsInStock</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="DimensionAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartDimensionAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Dimension" PropertyPath="UnitsInStock"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartDimensionRoleType/Category"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="Measures">
                            <Collection>
                                <PropertyPath>ProductID</PropertyPath>
                            </Collection>
                        </PropertyValue>
                        <PropertyValue Property="MeasureAttributes">
                            <Collection>
                                <Record Type="UI.ChartMeasureAttributeType">
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Measure" PropertyPath="ProductID"/>
                                    <PropertyValue Property="Role" EnumMember="UI.ChartMeasureRoleType/Axis1"/>
                                </Record>
                            </Collection>
 </PropertyValue>
 
How to resolve it?

entry.title: Empties Management Issue
entry.content:
Hi SAP Gurus,

We have an urgent client requirement in our empties management module(in SD-MM module)

Point no 1: Empties Balance Standard Report

Point no 2: Empties Security & Deposits process steps

Example for point no 1: Customer sends 100 Qty goods & they return 80 Qty material so my empties balance has to be shown as 20 qty in a standard report, Please let me know if there is any standard report or T-code which can show me the empties balance.

Example for point no 2: Please let me know how deposit or security process is operated in empties management.

 

Thanks & Regards

Sony 

(SD Consultant)

entry.title: Need help adding Live Connection from SAC to S/4Hana Public Cloud
entry.content:
Cannot add Live connection from S/4Hana Public Cloud
Both SAC and S/4Hana use the same identity provider (IAS)
Already created communication user (which is "SAC_LIVE_USER" in the screenshot)

All configurations follow this instruction

I tried to find a way to configure the InA role in S/4Hana but not found it yet.

Thanks,
Pakorn

entry.title: Re: Are you able to extend multiple vendors and assign th...
entry.content:
Hi,

Supplier - extend existing record by new org levels | SAP Help Portal

You can check the above migration object, which can extend existing supplier with additional org data.

entry.title: Re: Deficit of Stock with vendor unrestricted
entry.content: Do Migo with transfer posting with movement type 541 and give the vendor. your issue will resolve

entry.title: Re: "This application uses '@sap/cds' version 6.8, which is not compatible with the installed '
entry.content:
In my case the solution was adding the dependency in package.json, like this:

"dependencies": {
        ...
        "@sap/cds": "^5.9.8",
        "@sap/cds-dk": "^6.8.3",
        ...

entry.title: Re: How to connect SAP Data Services to Dataverse
entry.content: Officially DS doesn't support Dataverse, please check PAM document https://support.sap.com/content/dam/launchpad/en_us/pam/pam-essentials/TIP/PAM_DataServices_4_3.pdf

entry.title: Re: Date conversion directly in CDS View entity
entry.content:
Hi tafkap (prince fan?),

it would be helpful to know what code you exactly tried to use and which error you received.

Have you seen the post CDS View: Add days to Date? Here's explained how to use DATS_ADD_DAYS(date,days,on_error) and how to convert the parameter values.

Guido

entry.title: Re: Unable to see destinations for BPA deployment
entry.content:
Hey 
Please insure you have added the 3 properties to make you destination accessible in SAP BPA 
sap.applicationdevelopment.actions.enabled - true
sap.build.usage - odata_gen

sap.processautomation.enabled - true

add these 3 with the new property option, then check again

entry.title: when using vs code to deploy Fiori to on premise, can I only minified preload file instead of all js
entry.content:
Hi All,

Currently if using VS code to deploy Fiori app to On Premise, only the minified js file (and its map file) are uploaded to ABAP backend. However, we need the original js file except for the "Component-preload.js" file, just as the old Web IDE does. I have tried the option "ui5 build --exclude-task=minify", but the generated preload file will have the original js file with this option, which apparently is not good for performance. Is there some solution to deploy the original js file and minified preload file to ABAP backend?

Thanks,

Rayman

entry.title: Condition contract management in S/4 HANA- Settlement document split
entry.content:
Hello Gurus,

I have a question regarding Condition Contract Management in S/4 HANA. Our client has a requirement to split the settlement document generated for customers, as follows:

Since goods supplied under a condition contract may have various ‘Tax Dept / Tax Dest’ combinations, they would like this to be reflected in the settlement document created during the payout process. The options they are considering are:

- A separate settlement document for each ‘Tax Dept / Tax Dest’ combination, or
- Separate line items within the settlement document for each ‘Tax Dept / Tax Dest’ combination.

Is there any functionality in S/4 HANA that allows for splitting the settlement document by tax code, resulting in one settlement document per tax code?

Looking forward to your guidance.

Thank you!

entry.title: Re: Logic of CDC (Change Data Capture) in ABAP CDS View
entry.content: Noice. CDC concept certainly is 9999x better than 2LIS delta shenanigans.

entry.title: Re: SAP Companion Usage and Context Help Visits reports are blank
entry.content: These settings are irrelevant to SAP Companion for Web tracking. Follow Shane's answer. It's correct.

entry.title: Re: Multiple items of one material in a delivery an QM Inspection lot creation
entry.content: To make sure SKIP lots go to unrestricted stock while using "1 For each material document, material, batch, and storage location" for inspection lot creation, you can try these steps: 1. Adjust your **QM inspection type** settings to handle SKIP lots differently. 2. Update the **QM-IM interface** so SKIP lots are posted to unrestricted stock. 3. Use a **BAdI** to control the stock posting specifically for SKIP lots. 4. Modify the **MIGO** logic to prevent SKIP lots from going to Q stock. 5. If needed, create a custom solution to automatically route SKIP lots to unrestricted stock. This way, you can keep your inspection lot setup intact while ensuring SKIP lots post where you want them.

entry.title: Re: Multiple items of one material in a delivery an QM In...
entry.content:
To make sure SKIP lots go to unrestricted stock while using "1 For each material document, material, batch, and storage location" for inspection lot creation, you can try these steps:

1. Adjust your **QM inspection type** settings to handle SKIP lots differently.
2. Update the **QM-IM interface** so SKIP lots are posted to unrestricted stock.
3. Use a **BAdI** to control the stock posting specifically for SKIP lots.
4. Modify the **MIGO** logic to prevent SKIP lots from going to Q stock.
5. If needed, create a custom solution to automatically route SKIP lots to unrestricted stock.

This way, you can keep your inspection lot setup intact while ensuring SKIP lots post where you want them.

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: Error: Instance XXXX skipped to av...
entry.content:
Hi,

I think you need to run data loading multiple time to achieve this, using the RunID.

Product - extend existing record by new org levels | SAP Help Portal

Check out the link above, and the explanation of the RunID:

Run ID

On the Basic Data sheet and on all dependent sheets, you can find a Run ID key field. This field is a counter that you can use to run several enhancements for the same instance. You cannot import the same source record more than once in the same project. However, the Run ID field is an additional key field that lets you import the same product multiple times.

Example

In the first run, import product "A" with a new plant or sales area. Enter 1 in the Run ID field on the Basic Data sheet and in all dependent sheets.

In the second run, import product "A" again with another plant or sales area. Enter 2 in the Run ID field on the Basic Data sheet and in all dependent sheets that were already imported in the first run.

entry.title: Re: Attachment handling in CPI
entry.content:
see some attachment handling examples in the design guidelines at https://help.sap.com/docs/integration-suite/sap-integration-suite/attachment-handling

Alex

entry.title: Databases not show in choose company list in SAP B1 10.0 PL2405 HF1
entry.content:
Hello,

Can anyone please help us on install client in SAP B1 10.0 PL2405 HF1 there is no list of current server and database show 

1. Having admin rights to run SAP B1

2. Disable firewall

3. Edit b1-local-machine.xml both SAP and DI API folder with server name

4. Edit host file 

5. Clear temp file  %temp% and C:\Users\*user*\AppData\Local

But still cannot see list of database 

Thank you

entry.title: Re: Invoice header and position text
entry.content: Is there any possible to get invoice number from text data?

entry.title: Re: Query Regarding User Data Source for Enable Now
entry.content:
Create a role via API

Method: POST
Path: https://<customer>.enable-now.cloud.sap/!/group
Payload: {"group":{"display_name":"<ROLE_NAME>","reg_code":"","ou":"<ORG_UNIT_ID>"}}

Get a list of roles

Method: GET
Path: https://<customer>.enable-now.cloud.sap/api/authoring/v1/userRoles/

Create a business role via API

Method: POST
PATH: https://<customer>.enable-now.cloud.sap/api/authoring/v1/businessRoles/
Payload: {"userRoles":[{"uid":"<USER_ROLE_ID>"}],"active":true}

entry.title: Re: Application for Digital Skills Initiative: Irtaza Zaidi, SAP S/4HANA Production Planning

entry.title: Re: CAP-Apps crashes after deploying when trying to start
entry.content: Hi Zsolt, I think there is no more "cds" in the binaries and you have to use "cds-serve". See https://cap.cloud.sap/docs/releases/archive/2023/jun23#use-cds-serve-as-start-script

As per my knowledge it is related to authorization issue, you try with SU53 t code and share the details to BASIS persion.

Raju Mane

entry.title: Re: Migration Cockpit: Error: Instance XXXX skipped to av...

entry.title: Re: Updating the schema of CAPM without losing the data.
entry.content: I tried adding "schema_evolution": "auto" to the package.json file but while typing the cds deploy command, it is showing error in the terminal that the deployment is failed. Showing table already exists.

entry.title: Re: Internal table names for data of direct transfer insi...
entry.content:
Hello Stefan,

the data selected from source system are stored in intransparent tables. You will not be able to access the data on table level. 

We know  about this request - and will put in on our roadmap.

Best regards,

Sybille Lackermeier, SAP S/4HANA migration cockpit Product Management

entry.title: Re: Regarding "Data Overview" of SAP for Me
entry.content: >追加で質問が２つあります。 １．https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/dataoverview/ 以外に、SAP for Me上で、ディスク使用率を確認できるページはありますでしょうか。 ２．月に1回ではなく、もっと短い間隔やリアルタイムでディスク使用率を確認する方法はありますでしょか。なお、RISE環境を利用しているため、基本的に私たちがOS環境に直接ログインすることはできません。*回答：１．で質問が２つあります。 １．https://launchpad.support.sap.com/#/dataoverview/ 以外に、SAP for Me上で、ディスク使用率を確認できるページはありますでしょうか。 ２．月に1回ではなく、もっと短い間隔やリアルタイムでディスク使用率を確認する方法はありますでしょか。なお、RISE環境を利用しているため、基本的に私たちがOS環境に直接ログインすることはできません。*回答：１．SAP EarlyWatch Alert Workspace https://me.sap.com/app/ewaworkspace も利用可能と認識いたします。２．月に1回という頻度が足りない場合、ノート２７１６６５５セクションOption 3. Manual DVM data collection in the SAP S/4 Hana Systemに従い、週１回マニュアルで生成可能です。またもしSOLUTION MANAGERシステム存在の場合、ノートセクションOption 1. Automated Self-Service - Auto GSSに従い、頻度を調査可能です。

entry.title: How to call different service entity for value help in list report?
entry.content:
In the list report app object page, based on one of the header fields, when we create a new item, different service entity needs to be called for the same field value help.

Sample scenario: In College app, based on the course selected, value help need to be shown for subject and teacher field, where different CDS views needs to be called for each course. 

It may not be a real case scenario. If you have any pointers like controlling it in RAP behavior definition or metadata or Fiori list report extensions etc., please guide me.

Thank you,

Liya

entry.title: Re: Databases not show in choose company list in SAP B1 10.0 PL2405 HF1
entry.content: Did you install the SAP HANA Database Client?

entry.title: Re: Development Goal Plan - Evergreen or Yearly?
entry.content:
Hi

Creating an 'evergreen' development plan template is not uncommon. 

This primarily depends on how mature the organisation is with dev. goal creation - as all goals will get pulled into the yearly performance form, so if there are only a few, the non-relevant ones can be easily deleted. 

Things you will need to consider:

1. If you are rating development goals in your yearly performance form, you will need to consider the 'sync' config carefully. Turning the sync off will work better with an evergreen template - as the dev goals will get pulled into the yearly performance form, but when goals that are not relevant are deleted, they will not delete from the evergreen development goal template.

2. You will need to create appropriate categories to track dev goals that are relevant for now vs future - this will help with accurate reporting. 

3. Consider creating custom fields in the dev goal template to capture any other specific information as it is an ongoing template.

4. As this is an ongoing template, deleting existing fields / values will have impacts to consider.

entry.title: Re: Purchase Requisition not editable if Purchase Order e...
entry.content:
Hi,
I think you can try to use BAdI MM_PUR_S4_PR_CHECK. This BAdI is designed to perform custom checks on purchase requisitions, You can use CDS View I_PurchaseRequisitionItemAPI01 and I_PurchaseOrderItemAPI01 to fetch data to check via this BAdI.

Best Regards,

Zhehui
